expectations.text: Produces an actual content-pillar structure, not just questions
expectations.evidence: Delivers four pillars with examples and channel mapping.

expectations.text: Gives at least one concrete example topic or format under each pillar
expectations.evidence: Each pillar has an e.g. episode/newsletter example.

expectations.text: States an assumption in one line about audience or goal
expectations.evidence: Opens 'Assuming: audience = early indie game devs; goal = grow a loyal audience.'

expectations.text: Does not stall the deliverable behind a list of clarifying questions
expectations.evidence: Delivers first; single optional follow-up at the end.
